summary: Fresh MVP DirectDine tested end-to-end. Backend: 24/24 pytest tests PASSED covering auth (customer/owner register, courier-register rejection, login, /me with & without token), restaurants+menu listing, menu CRUD role guards, courier creation+location updates, complete order lifecycle (create -> accept -> preparing -> assign courier -> delivered), scoped list by role, and cross-role forbidden checks. Frontend: mobile viewport (390x844) — login screen loads with EN/TR toggle, customer login redirects to /home with restaurant list + 0% commission badges, restaurant card -> menu -> add-item -> cart -> place-order works and redirects to /tracking/{id} showing map placeholder, status timeline, order details. Owner login lands on /(owner)/orders, add menu item modal works (TEST_UI_Item persisted), couriers screen renders, accept/prepare/assign flows verified. Courier login lands on /(courier)/deliveries with Update Location button posting to backend and assigned order list. Overall: MVP is stable, all critical user journeys pass.

issues: No visible logout button on courier UI (unlike customer /profile). Consider a profile/logout tab for couriers so QA and users can sign out cleanly.
Web preview shows a placeholder 'Live Map' box because react-native-maps is stubbed on web (as documented in mocked_apis). This is expected behavior for web preview.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Non-blocking but should be migrated. Occurs multiple times at app load.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Emitted after login. Non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional/Nice-to-have) Add logout affordance for the courier role (either a profile tab or a header button in deliveries.tsx).
(Non-blocking) Migrate deprecated RN web style props: replace 'shadow*' with 'boxShadow' and 'pointerEvents' prop with style.pointerEvents to silence console warnings.
No functional bugs to fix — MVP is releasable per spec.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py wisely excludes MongoDB _id via projections (find_one/find with {'_id': 0}) — good.
Passwords are hashed with bcrypt; JWT signed with HS256 and 7-day expiry using JWT_SECRET from env — good.
Role-based dependency (require_roles) is applied consistently to owner/courier/customer endpoints — good.
Auto-seed on startup is idempotent (checks owner1 existence) — good.
Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL consistently; testID coverage is broad and reliable.
server.py is a single file (~620 lines) — approaching the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into routers/models modules in a future refactor.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (login EN/TR toggle, customer browse->order->tracking, owner orders/menu/couriers/accept/prepare/assign, courier update-location)

seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds on startup. Tests created ephemeral TEST_-prefixed users/menu items/orders; menu test item deleted, others left as harmless test artifacts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints and all frontend flows in the review request passed. If retesting, reuse /app/backend/tests/test_directdine_api.py. Seeded creds in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Map view is intentionally a placeholder on web (react-native-maps stubbed). Courier location update button randomly nudges lat/lng (mocked GPS).
